analysis_design.candidate_basis: Trout is the nearest sampled site to Buffalo Bill Reservoir and had zero direct rainbow-trout stocking; the paper infers upstream movement from the stocked reservoir
analysis_design.published_comparator_guardrail: 1 - site mean YCT ancestry q; derived from these same SNPs, not independent validation

standard_contract.guardrail: the independently filtered GT and PL panels are correlated but not fully paired; representation and locus ascertainment both change

within_population_polymorphism.guardrail: the independently filtered GT and PL panels are correlated but not fully paired; representation and locus ascertainment both change

direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: One historically admixed two-species system with modern proxy references, complete population--library confounding, same-data published ancestry summaries, and seven correlated sensitivity rows. No row is a formal direction or gate accuracy datum.

outcome.accuracy_guardrail: Seven representation/filter/reference/target rows reuse one two-species system and supply no accuracy denominator. Published ancestry summaries reuse the same SNPs.

adjudication.guardrail: ecological exposure, reference swaps, representation changes, and the candidate-null are correlated stress tests; none supplies an independent direction or gate label
adjudication.severe_OOD_rule: max(direction RMS-z, gate RMS-z) > 10; heuristic diagnostic, not calibrated support

external_expectation.candidate_basis: Trout is the nearest sampled site to Buffalo Bill Reservoir and had zero direct rainbow-trout stocking; the paper infers upstream movement from the stocked reservoir
external_expectation.candidate_forward_direction: StoryHatchery RBT proxy P3 -> target P2
external_expectation.tree_contract_status: operational proxy order only; long-term hybridization, two-taxon stocking, modern references, and recurrent backcrossing do not establish a clean ((P1,P2),P3) event

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

input_audit.population_library_confounding: complete for the frozen main trio

model_free_comparator.finite_sample_and_uncertainty_guardrail: f3 is a plug-in product of sample allele frequencies with no finite-sample correction; the 29-chromosome block bootstrap resamples chromosomes, not fish, and is descriptive rather than a formal admixture test
model_free_comparator.interpretation: reference-invariant descriptive geometry; projection is not bounded ancestry, and neither projection nor f3 estimates temporal direction

scaffold_block_bootstrap.guardrail: descriptive linked-locus sensitivity only; case ascertainment and label reuse remain
scaffold_block_bootstrap.method: nonparametric scaffold-block bootstrap with equal scaffold resampling

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

runtime.process_priority: BelowNormal requested at runner start on Windows

unique_PL_argmin.rule: unique minimum of the diploid biallelic PL triplet maps to 0/0, 0/1, or 1/1; ties/missing/malformed become ./.; no extra DP/GQ filter

converter_audit.methodological_consequence: informative low-GQ PL values attached to masked GT cells are discarded; the archived Entropy input is therefore not a lossless genotype-likelihood representation
converter_audit.released_behavior: when GT is ./., overwrite the three parsed PL values with 0 0 0 before writing MPGL

source.corrigendum_audit: DOI 10.1111/mec.15381 and its existence are confirmed, but the publisher-hosted correction content was unavailable to this audit; its substantive delta remains unaudited

dryad_v2_archive_audit.duplicate_contract: each path appears twice with identical size and MD5
dryad_v2_archive_audit.trust_boundary: extracted file bytes, not dynamically generated ZIP wrapper

source.locus_ascertainment_guardrail: the released 12,666 SNPs were globally filtered at at least 60% data and MAF >5% using all 1,286 fish, including scored cohorts; DNNaic pooled/within-population filters then use panel labels, so loci are not prospectively held out

metadata_audit.guardrail: In the main trio every population uses a disjoint set of sequencing libraries; population, call rate, and batch are therefore inseparable.

predictor_response_audit.archive_gap: per-individual Entropy q/Q values and author ancestry-class labels are not archived; only site summaries are released

frozen_target_selection_before_genomic_o.rule: minimum distance_m_BBR among all released predictor rows

predictor_response_audit.same_data_guardrail: published response values were computed from these same SNPs and are descriptive comparators, never independent truth labels

guardrails: Candidate C is an ecological introduction-history prior, not pedigree or exclusive-edge truth.
Both trout taxa were stocked and long-term hybridization/backcrossing makes temporal direction non-unique.
The main P1, P2, and P3 cohorts use completely disjoint sequencing-library sets.
Published site ancestry summaries reuse the same SNPs and cannot be independent labels.
The released SNPs were globally filtered at at least 60% data and MAF above 5% using all fish, including scored cohorts; later locus filters also use panel labels.
Seven representation/filter/reference/target rows are correlated sensitivities, not trials.
analysis_design.primary_P2: Trout: 58 fish from the sampled site nearest Buffalo Bill Reservoir

paper.title: Variable hybridization outcomes in trout are predicted by historical fish stocking and environmental context

release_discrepancies: Dryad version 2 lists every one of nine paths twice with identical size and MD5; importers must deduplicate by path and digest.
Per-individual Entropy q/Q values and ancestry classes are absent; only site-level response summaries are archived.
The released vcf2mpgl.pl replaces parsed PL values with 0 0 0 whenever GT is ./., discarding informative masked likelihoods.
Corrigendum DOI 10.1111/mec.15381 is confirmed, but its publisher-hosted correction content was unavailable and remains substantively unaudited.
